subtitle: The High Spire
designIntent: A compact five-hit bullet-hell platform boss that tests World 01 movement, jumping, route reading, and Homing Attack without becoming a normal scrolling stage.

exitGoal.unlockCondition: Boss phase 5 defeated and all hostile projectiles cleared

homingCores.role: Lift the player from the left side platform into an aerial dodge or attack route
Lift the player from the right side platform into an aerial dodge or attack route
Start a fast horizontal crossing through the arena center
Complete a fast horizontal crossing through the arena center

phases.title: Royal Fan
phases.pattern: Three slow fan-shaped volleys aimed at the player's current position, followed by a long recovery.
phases.playerLesson: Read simple gaps, use the floor and side platforms, then jump or Homing Attack during recovery.
phases.attackWindow: Boss descends to center height after the third fan volley.

phases.title: Azure Divide
phases.pattern: A dense vertical bullet wall sweeps from alternating sides while the center floor becomes unsafe.
phases.playerLesson: Use the cross cores to Homing Attack through the center before the wall closes.
phases.attackWindow: Boss pauses above the destination side after each successful crossing.

phases.title: Silver Rain
phases.pattern: Staggered vertical rain leaves temporary gaps that shift between floor, side platforms, and upper platforms.
phases.playerLesson: Climb and descend between platform heights instead of remaining on the floor.
phases.attackWindow: Boss drops near the center platform after the final rain lane.

phases.title: Crown Orbit
phases.pattern: Two rotating rings expand from the boss while aimed shots punish standing still.
phases.playerLesson: Maintain a circular route using floor, side platforms, lift cores, and cross cores.
phases.attackWindow: The orbit breaks after two rotations and exposes the boss at arena center.

phases.title: White Palace Finale
phases.pattern: Short remixes of fan, divide, rain, and orbit patterns with reduced recovery time.
phases.playerLesson: Combine every World 01 movement skill and choose between safe platform routes and faster Homing routes.
phases.attackWindow: A final long recovery begins after all four pattern fragments are survived.

implementationNotes: Do not register this blockout as a playable StageData entry until boss state, projectile hazards, and goal gating exist.
The boss should take exactly one hit per phase and become invulnerable while a pattern is active.
Azure Cores used by the arena must regenerate quickly and must not count toward the enemy score.
Projectiles should be cleared between phases so the next pattern always starts from a deterministic state.
Falling should respawn the player inside the same phase instead of resetting boss health.
The exit goal remains hidden and non-collidable until phase 5 is defeated.
